name: praxiskit
description: Turn product intent into governed agent execution and final acceptance review through composable skills.

interface.longDescription: PraxisKit turns ideas into right-sized plans, coordinated agent execution, and final result reviews for user acceptance.
defaultPrompt: Use shape-to-plan to turn this rough idea into the lightest correct plan.
Use plan-to-review to inspect the next executable batch; execute only if I explicitly authorize it.
Use kanban-to-agents to advance work/kanban.md with coordinated agents.
